assertions.evidence: /en/ut-cv-full-353a918a returned 200 and HTML contains custom-view text 'UT Full EN Title'.

Custom-view HTML contains both <nav> and <footer>, confirming main layout wrapper.

summary: Rerun routing validation passed all 7 assigned assertions after setup stabilization.
